policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="deploymentName" value="@{
        try {
            var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
            return (string)(body?["model"]?.ToString()) ?? "unknown";
        } catch { return "unknown"; }
    }" />

    
    
      
        
          
          
            application/json
          
          {"error":{"code":"ModelNotSpecified","message":"Could not parse a 'model' field from the JSON request body. Ensure the body is valid JSON, e.g. {\"model\":\"<deployment>\",\"messages\":[...]}. (A common cause is shell quote mangling of the JSON payload.)"}}
        
      
    

    
    
    
    
      
        <set-variable name="autoPromptText" value="@{
            try {
                var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
                if (body == null) { return ""; }
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                var msgs = body["messages"] as JArray;
                if (msgs != null) {
                    foreach (var m in msgs) {
                        var content = m["content"];
                        if (content == null) { continue; }
                        if (content.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)content); sb.Append('\n'); }
                        else if (content.Type == JTokenType.Array) {
                            foreach (var part in (JArray)content) {
                                var t = part["text"];
                                if (t != null && t.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)t); sb.Append('\n'); }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                var input = body["input"];
                if (input != null) {
                    if (input.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)input); sb.Append('\n'); }
                    else if (input.Type == JTokenType.Array) {
                        foreach (var item in (JArray)input) {
                            if (item.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)item); sb.Append('\n'); continue; }
                            var content = item["content"];
                            if (content == null) { continue; }
                            if (content.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)content); sb.Append('\n'); }
                            else if (content.Type == JTokenType.Array) {
                                foreach (var part in (JArray)content) {
                                    var t = part["text"] ?? part["input_text"] ?? part["output_text"];
                                    if (t != null && t.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)t); sb.Append('\n'); }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                return sb.ToString();
            } catch { return ""; }
        }" />
        
        <set-variable name="autoUserText" value="@{
            try {
                var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
                if (body == null) { return ""; }
                var msgs = body["messages"] as JArray;
                if (msgs != null) {
                    for (int i = msgs.Count - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                        var roleTok = msgs[i]["role"];
                        var role = roleTok == null ? "" : ((string)roleTok).ToLowerInvariant();
                        if (role != "user") { continue; }
                        var content = msgs[i]["content"];
                        if (content == null) { return ""; }
                        if (content.Type == JTokenType.String) { return (string)content; }
                        if (content.Type == JTokenType.Array) {
                            var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                            foreach (var part in (JArray)content) {
                                var t = part["text"] ?? part["input_text"] ?? part["output_text"];
                                if (t != null && t.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)t); sb.Append('\n'); }
                            }
                            return sb.ToString();
                        }
                        return "";
                    }
                    return "";
                }
                var input = body["input"];
                if (input != null) {
                    if (input.Type == JTokenType.String) { return (string)input; }
                    if (input.Type == JTokenType.Array) {
                        var arr = (JArray)input;
                        for (int i = arr.Count - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            var item = arr[i];
                            if (item.Type == JTokenType.String) { return (string)item; }
                            var roleTok = item["role"];
                            if (roleTok != null && ((string)roleTok).ToLowerInvariant() != "user") { continue; }
                            var content = item["content"];
                            if (content == null) { continue; }
                            if (content.Type == JTokenType.String) { return (string)content; }
                            if (content.Type == JTokenType.Array) {
                                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                                foreach (var part in (JArray)content) {
                                    var t = part["text"] ?? part["input_text"] ?? part["output_text"];
                                    if (t != null && t.Type == JTokenType.String) { sb.Append((string)t); sb.Append('\n'); }
                                }
                                return sb.ToString();
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                return "";
            } catch { return ""; }
        }" />
        |@@ |(^|\n)\s*(def |class |function |func |import |from |#include|public |private |protected |const |let |var |return |if \(|for \(|while \()|;\s*\n|\{\s*\n|\}\s*\n|Traceback|Exception|\.(py|ts|js|tsx|jsx|cs|java|go|rb|cpp|rs|sql|sh|ps1|ya?ml|html|css)\b", System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
            return rx.IsMatch(text);
        }" />
        <set-variable name="autoDecision" value="@{
            var sizeUser = (string)context.Variables["autoUserText"];
            var sizeText = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sizeUser) ? (string)context.Variables["autoPromptText"] : sizeUser;
            int len = sizeText.Length;
            bool coding = (bool)context.Variables["autoIsCoding"];
            int threshold = int.Parse("{{auto-route-length-threshold}}");
            int band = int.Parse("{{auto-route-ambiguous-band}}");
            if (coding) { return "full"; }
            if (len >= threshold + band) { return "full"; }
            if (len < threshold - band) { return "mini"; }
            return "ambiguous";
        }" />
        
          
            
            
            
              @("{{foundry-commercial-base-url}}/openai/deployments/{{auto-route-classifier-deployment}}/chat/completions?api-version={{foundry-commercial-api-version}}")
              POST
              
                @("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["autoClassifierToken"])
              
              
                application/json
              
              @{
                  var prompt = (string)context.Variables["autoUserText"];
                  if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prompt)) { prompt = (string)context.Variables["autoPromptText"]; }
                  if (prompt.Length > 4000) { prompt = prompt.Substring(0, 4000); }
                  var payload = new JObject(
                      new JProperty("messages", new JArray(
                          new JObject(new JProperty("role", "system"), new JProperty("content", "You are a routing classifier. Reply with exactly one lowercase word and nothing else: simple or complex. complex = coding, debugging, multi-step reasoning, or long/technical context; simple = short factual or conversational requests.")),
                          new JObject(new JProperty("role", "user"), new JProperty("content", prompt))
                      )),
                      new JProperty("max_tokens", 1),
                      new JProperty("temperature", 0)
                  );
                  return payload.ToString();
              }
            
            <set-variable name="autoClassifierLabel" value="@{
                try {
                    var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["autoClassifierResp"];
                    if (resp == null || resp.StatusCode != 200) { return "error"; }
                    var j = resp.Body.As();
                    var c = (string)(j["choices"]?[0]?["message"]?["content"]);
                    return (c ?? "").Trim().ToLowerInvariant();
                } catch { return "error"; }
            }" />
            
          
          
            
          
        
        
      
    

    
    

    
      
      
      
      
      
    

    

    
    @{
        try {
            var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
            if (body == null) { return context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true); }
            bool changed = false;
            var model = (context.Variables.ContainsKey("deploymentName") ? (string)context.Variables["deploymentName"] : "").ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isReasoning = model.StartsWith("gpt-5") || model.StartsWith("o1") || model.StartsWith("o3") || model.StartsWith("o4");
            if (isReasoning) {
                foreach (var p in new[] { "temperature", "top_p", "presence_penalty", "frequency_penalty" }) {
                    if (body.Remove(p)) { changed = true; }
                }
                var maxTok = body["max_tokens"];
                if (maxTok != null) {
                    if (body["max_completion_tokens"] == null) {
                        body["max_completion_tokens"] = maxTok;
                    }
                    body.Remove("max_tokens");
                    changed = true;
                }
            }
            var path = context.Request.OriginalUrl.Path.ToLowerInvariant();
            if (!path.EndsWith("/responses")) {
                var stream = body["stream"];
                if (stream != null && stream.Type == JTokenType.Boolean && (bool)stream) {
                    var opts = body["stream_options"] as JObject;
                    if (opts == null) { opts = new JObject(); body["stream_options"] = opts; }
                    opts["include_usage"] = true;
                    changed = true;
                }
            }
            return changed ? body.ToString() : context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
        } catch {
            return context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
        }
    }

    
    
    

    
    

    
    
      
        
        
        
          
            
            
            
            
              @("https://{{foundry-commercial-authority-host}}/{{foundry-commercial-tenant-id}}/oauth2/v2.0/token")
              POST
              
                application/x-www-form-urlencoded
              
              @{
                  var assertion = context.Variables.ContainsKey("govFederationAssertion") ? (string)context.Variables["govFederationAssertion"] : "";
                  return "grant_type=client_credentials"
                    + "&client_id=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString("{{foundry-commercial-client-id}}")
                    + "&client_assertion_type=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString("urn:ietf:params:oauth:client-assertion-type:jwt-bearer")
                    + "&client_assertion=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString(assertion)
                    + "&scope=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString("{{foundry-commercial-token-resource}}".TrimEnd('/') + "/.default");
              }
            
            <set-variable name="commercialSpToken" value="@{
                try {
                    var resp = context.Variables.ContainsKey("commercialTokenResp") ? (IResponse)context.Variables["commercialTokenResp"] : null;
                    if (resp == null || resp.StatusCode != 200) { return ""; }
                    var j = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    return (string)(j["access_token"]) ?? "";
                } catch { return ""; }
            }" />
            
              
                
                  
                  
                    application/json
                  
                  @{
                      string code = "unreachable";
                      try {
                          var resp = context.Variables.ContainsKey("commercialTokenResp") ? (IResponse)context.Variables["commercialTokenResp"] : null;
                          if (resp != null) {
                              var j = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                              code = ((string)(j["error"]) ?? ("http_" + resp.StatusCode)) + ": " + ((string)(j["error_description"]) ?? "");
                          }
                      } catch { code = "token_endpoint_error"; }
                      return "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"CommercialTokenFederationFailed\",\"message\":\"APIM could not federate to a Commercial-tenant token. Verify the commercial SP federated credential (issuer/subject/audience) trusts the Gov APIM managed identity, that cross-cloud federation is permitted, and that the commercial token endpoint is in the APIM egress allowlist. AAD error: " + code + "\"}}";
                  }
                
              
            
            <set-variable name="commercialTokenTtl" value="@{
                try {
                    var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["commercialTokenResp"];
                    var j = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    int expires = (int?)j["expires_in"] ?? 3600;
                    return System.Math.Max(expires - 300, 60);
                } catch { return 300; }
            }" />
            
          
        
        
          @("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["commercialSpToken"])
        
      
      
        
        
        
          
            
            
              @("https://{{foundry-commercial-authority-host}}/{{foundry-commercial-tenant-id}}/oauth2/v2.0/token")
              POST
              
                application/x-www-form-urlencoded
              
              @{
                  return "grant_type=client_credentials"
                    + "&client_id=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString("{{foundry-commercial-client-id}}")
                    + "&client_secret=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString("{{foundry-commercial-client-secret}}")
                    + "&scope=" + System.Uri.EscapeDataString("{{foundry-commercial-token-resource}}".TrimEnd('/') + "/.default");
              }
            
            
            <set-variable name="commercialSpToken" value="@{
                try {
                    var resp = context.Variables.ContainsKey("commercialTokenResp") ? (IResponse)context.Variables["commercialTokenResp"] : null;
                    if (resp == null || resp.StatusCode != 200) { return ""; }
                    var j = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    return (string)(j["access_token"]) ?? "";
                } catch { return ""; }
            }" />
            
              
                
                  
                  
                    application/json
                  
                  
                  @{
                      string code = "unreachable";
                      try {
                          var resp = context.Variables.ContainsKey("commercialTokenResp") ? (IResponse)context.Variables["commercialTokenResp"] : null;
                          if (resp != null) {
                              var j = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                              code = ((string)(j["error"]) ?? ("http_" + resp.StatusCode)) + ": " + ((string)(j["error_description"]) ?? "");
                          }
                      } catch { code = "token_endpoint_error"; }
                      return "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"CommercialTokenAcquisitionFailed\",\"message\":\"APIM could not obtain a Commercial-tenant backend token. Check the service-principal credentials and that the commercial token endpoint is in the APIM egress allowlist. AAD error: " + code + "\"}}";
                  }
                
              
            
            
            <set-variable name="commercialTokenTtl" value="@{
                try {
                    var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["commercialTokenResp"];
                    var j = resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    int expires = (int?)j["expires_in"] ?? 3600;
                    return System.Math.Max(expires - 300, 60);
                } catch { return 300; }
            }" />
            
          
        
        
          @("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["commercialSpToken"])
        
      
      
        
      
      
        
          {{foundry-commercial-api-key}}
        
      
    
    

    
    
      
        
      
      
        
      
    

    
    
      
        
          {{foundry-commercial-api-version}}
